title: Finite Network Flow And Cut Certificates

solver_reuse.target: finite network-flow replay and max-flow/min-cut theorem boundary
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact replay checks one feasible flow, one cut certificate, one capacity violation, and one cut-capacity upper-bound violation; no source solver artifact is committed yet, so this is not a solver regression or benchmark claim.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a source exact-arithmetic artifact and checked proof route for capacity, conservation, or cut-bound conflicts; keep the general max-flow/min-cut theorem in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay finite directed capacities, flows, conservation equations, and source/sink balance over exact rationals.
Replay finite cut partitions and cut capacities before using a cut as an optimality certificate.
Reject malformed rows by recomputing the violating capacity bound or cut-capacity upper bound.
Add a source exact-arithmetic artifact and checked certificate route before promoting the pack as a solver regression.
Keep arbitrary-network max-flow/min-cut, integrality, algorithm correctness, min-cost flow, and asymptotic complexity as Lean/theorem horizons until proof artifacts exist.
